disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of severe, unrelenting right arm pain that began about 90 minutes ago at rest while watching television
trigger_question_examples: When and how did the pain start?
What were you doing when it came on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on all of a sudden about an hour and a half ago while I was just sitting watching TV, and it's been agonizing ever since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The hand has become waxy and pale/white and is now developing blotchy mottling
trigger_question_examples: Does the skin look different to the other side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's gone a waxy white colour, and now it's starting to look blotchy and mottled.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The affected hand and forearm feel perishingly cold to the touch compared with the other side
trigger_question_examples: Is it colder than your other hand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it's freezing cold, much colder than my left hand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pins-and-needles in the fingers progressing to numbness, with new weakness gripping the hand
trigger_question_examples: Any numbness, tingling or weakness in the hand?
Can you move or grip with the fingers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started as pins and needles and now the fingers are going numb, and I can hardly grip anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient has a known irregular heartbeat (atrial fibrillation)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any heart conditions?
Have you ever been told you have an irregular heartbeat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've got an irregular heartbeat — they call it atrial fibrillation.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is prescribed a blood thinner (apixaban) but has missed the last three days of doses after losing the prescription
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medicines, especially a blood thinner?
Have you been taking them as prescribed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm meant to take a blood thinner but I lost my script and I've missed it for about three days.
